content:
In the love and light of the One Infinite Creator, I greet you now with a vision—

A great, ancient tree stands alone in the center of a wide, open plain. Its roots stretch deep into the earth, intertwining with crystals of memory and silent knowing. Its branches reach beyond the sky, brushing the veil between worlds. Around it, the air shimmers with presence—every leaf a whisper, every breeze a breath.
